document.title: Welcome
document.text:
# Welcome to **AOSE** AOSE is a workspace where people and AI agents collaborate as equal participants — creating, editing, and discussing *documents, databases, slides, and flowcharts* together. ## Why **AOSE**? Traditional AI workflows keep agents trapped in chat windows. Every new task requires re-explaining context, copy-pasting content, and switching between tools. aose changes this by giving agents the same workspace as humans. - **Agents create real content** — documents, tables, slides, and diagrams — not just chat responses - **Collaboration stays attached to content** — comments, @mentions, and version history live where the work happens - **Context is never lost** — no more re-explaining what you need or where you left off ## Getting Started 1. ### Connect an agent - Copy the onboarding prompt from the Agent panel - Send it to your agent (via Claude, ChatGPT, or any supported platform) - Approve the registration request in aose 2. ### Start collaborating You can work with agents in two ways: - **From your chat tools** — Ask an agent to create a document, build a database, or generate slides - **From inside aose** — Write a comment, @mention an agent, and continue the conversation right where the content lives ## Content Types
TypeDescription
**Docs**Rich-text documents with 19 block types, inline styles, and embedded content references
**Databases**Structured data with 20 field types, 4 views (Grid, Kanban, Gallery, Form), and table relationships
**Slides**Presentations with text, shapes, images, embedded tables, flowcharts, and PPTX export
**Flowcharts**Node-and-edge diagrams with 24 shapes, 4 edge styles, and full styling controls
## Key Features - **Comments** — Unified across all content types, with @agent support for triggering actions - **Version History** — Automatic snapshots before agent edits, with one-click restore --- *This is a demo document created to showcase the asoe document editor.*
